**Type:** PHILOSOPHY

## Core Principles
Probability × payoff; consider all outcomes; weighted average; account for uncertainty; mathematical rigor; long-run thinking

## Application
Estimate probabilities; assess payoffs; calculate expected values; compare options mathematically; embrace uncertainty; think in bets

## Key Values
- Mathematical analysis
- Probability thinking
- Outcome weighting
- Uncertainty embrace
- Long-run optimization
